items.title: Global Cyber Monday online sales hit $17.3 billion, Salesforce data shows
items.description: Shoppers spent ​$17.3 billion online ‌on Cyber Monday, Salesforce data showed,‌ capping the Black Friday weekend. Global online sales were up 5.3% through 12 ⁠p.m. ET (1700 GMT), according to ‍the data firm.

items.title: Earnings live: MongoDB stock soars on strong Q3 results as reports from CrowdStrike, Marvell loom
items.description: The third quarter earnings season has been mostly positive, with most of the reports in the rearview mirror.

items.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff Just Said Gemini 3 Changed the World. Does That Make GOOGL Stock a Buy?
items.description: GOOGL's new AI model is turning heads in a hot resurgence, sparking fresh enthusiasm. So, is now the perfect time to scoop up GOOGL shares?
